#verify-bar-box{
    background: #f8f8f8;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area {
    display: -webkit-box;
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    height: 48px;
    line-height: 48px;
    position: relative;
    /* background: #FFFFFF; */
    text-align: center;
    -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg {
    padding-left: 16px;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Regular;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #000;
    z-index: 3;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg > #verify-sort {
    font-family: PingFangSC-Medium;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #4A90E2;
    line-height: 16px;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area #flex-span  {
    -webkit-box-flex: 1;
    flex-grow: 1;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area div:nth-child(2)>#verify-bar-code {
    height: 16px;
    vertical-align: middle;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area #verify-bar-close {
    width: 32px;
    margin-right: 8px;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area #verify-bar-close svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    vertical-align: middle;
}
#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel {
    height: 150px;
}
#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .valid-text {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    height: 32px;
    line-height: 32px;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Medium;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    padding-left: 12px;
    -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    z-index: 99;
    padding-right: 12px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .validate-pass {
    background: #A0CC49;
    z-index: 999999;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .validate-fail {
    background: #EB2F2F;
    z-index: 999999;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel {
    margin: 16px 16px 0 16px;
    -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    position: relative;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-tools {
    height: 40px;
    line-height: 40px;
    padding: 16px 0;
    z-index: 2;
    text-align: right;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-tools  > #button-refresh {
    border: none;
    outline: 0 none;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Regular;
    font-size: 16px;
    background: transparent;
    vertical-align: middle;
    /* color: #4A90E2; */
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-tools  > #button-refresh .icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    vertical-align: middle;
    /* fill: #4A90E2; */
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-tools  > #button-refresh span {
    vertical-align: middle;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-tools #button-submit {
    width: 80px;
    height: 40px;
    /* background: #4A90E2; */
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: none;
    outline: 0 none;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Regular;
    font-size: 16px;
    /* color: #FFFFFF; */
    vertical-align: middle;
    margin-left: 32px;
    margin-right: 24px;
}

#verify-canvas {
    cursor: pointer;
}
/**
 * 等待动画
 */

 #verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    background: #fff;
    opacity: 0.5;
    z-index: 100;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading div {
    width: 3px;
    height: 8px;
    background: #000;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    opacity: 0;

    -webkit-animation: loading 1.2s linear infinite;
    animation: loading 1.2s linear infinite;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line1 {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0s;
    transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0, -12px);
    animation-delay: 0s;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line2 {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(30deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.1s;

    animation-delay: 0.1s;
}

    -webkit-transform: rotate(60deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.2s;
    transform: rotate(60deg) translate(0, -12px);
    animation-delay: 0.2s;
}

    -webkit-transform: rotate(90deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.3s;
    transform: rotate(90deg) translate(0, -12px);
    animation-delay: 0.3s;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line5 {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(120deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.4s;
    transform: rotate(120deg) translate(0, -12px);
    animation-delay: 0.4s;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line6 {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(150deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.5s;

    animation-delay: 0.5s;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line7 {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(180deg) translate(0, -12px);
    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.6s;

}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line8 {

    -webkit-animation-delay: 0.7s;

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line9 {

#verify-bar-box > #verify-canvas-panel .vefify-canvas-mask > .vefify-canvas-loading .line10 {

#verify-bar-box{
    background: #f8f8f8;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area {
    display: -webkit-box;
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    height: 48px;
    line-height: 48px;
    position: relative;
    /* background: #FFFFFF; */
    text-align: center;
    -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg {
    padding-left: 16px;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Regular;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #000;
    z-index: 3;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg > #verify-sort {
    font-family: PingFangSC-Medium;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #4A90E2;
    line-height: 16px;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area #flex-span  {
    -webkit-box-flex: 1;
    flex-grow: 1;
}

#verify-bar-box{
    background: #f8f8f8;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area {
    display: -webkit-box;
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    height: 48px;
    line-height: 48px;
    position: relative;
    /* background: #FFFFFF; */
    text-align: center;
    -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg {
    padding-left: 16px;
    font-family: PingFangSC-Regular;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #000;
    z-index: 3;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area > #verify-bar-msg > #verify-sort {
    font-family: PingFangSC-Medium;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #4A90E2;
    line-height: 16px;
}

#verify-bar-box > #verify-bar-area #flex-span  {
    -webkit-box-flex: 1;
    flex-grow: 1;
}
